topic: spec drift and prior context-optimization efforts across all .opencode/specs/*

detail: phase_init bound artifact_dir to fanout override; config/strategy/registry/dashboard created

focus: Broad full-tree completion-state drift survey (spec.md Status vs graph-metadata.json)
noveltyJustification: First pass; establishes systemic baseline (~37% raw / ~19% semantic status mismatch) not confined to the five renumber tracks.

focus: Numbering drift across non-renumber tracks (Q2): dual-scheme + gaps
noveltyJustification: New dual-scheme root-cause characterization (local per-track vs global-offset) and ruled-out namespaced collisions; premise seeded but mechanism is new.

ruledOut.approach: Cross-track number collision as a drift category
ruledOut.reason: Track path prefix disambiguates identical numbers; not a real collision

focus: Naming-convention violations vs sk-doc/032 kebab-case program (Q3)
noveltyJustification: New bucket quantification (61 snake_case dirs, 4 clusters) + convention flip-flop churn; slightly lower signal as z_archive/z_future partly seeded and many hits are scratch artifacts.

ruledOut.approach: Primary numbered packets have snake_case slugs
ruledOut.reason: Numbered slugs are clean kebab-case; deviations confined to z_archive/z_future/changelog/scratch

focus: Prior context-optimization efforts across packets (Q4): de-dup to 6 patterns + precedent for phase 007
noveltyJustification: Six-pattern context-optimization taxonomy + cyclical lifecycle reframing are new analysis; program existence partly seeded but mechanism de-dup + 007 precedent is new.

ruledOut.reason: Most are research-iteration summarize noise; real efforts are ~6 mechanisms across ~10 packets

noveltyJustification: Resolves two open questions with evidence (sk-design intentional draft; root descriptions.json generated); broader Q1/Q5 characterization partly seeded so moderate novelty.

ruledOut.reason: It is a generated aggregate index {version,generated,folders}

note: 5/5 key questions answered; trend 1.0,0.80,0.65,0.75,0.55; minIterations(3) met
